questionHtml:
What is the IUPAC name of the molecule shown?

A.  2,4-dimethylhexane

B.  3,5-dimethylhexane

C.  2-methyl-4-ethylpentane

D.  2-ethyl-4-methylpentane

meta.title: What is the IUPAC name of the molecule shown? A. 2,4-dimethylhexane B. 3,5-dimethylhexane C. 2-methyl-4-ethylpentane D. 2-ethyl-4-methylpentane
